Free Service Business Pricing Cheat Sheet

The Service Business Pricing Cheat Sheet

A free 2-page PDF with the three numbers that decide whether your service business pays you properly:

  • The pricing formula — estimated hours × target hourly rate, quoted flat, and why "flat, never hourly" is the rule
  • The minimum job floor — the smallest price you'll start a vehicle for, and how to hold it
  • The route-density rule — why clustered jobs beat well-priced jobs, in your actual bank account

It's for anyone who drives to the work — cleaning, lawn care, pressure washing, windows, junk removal — and it's written by an operator who grew a route-based service company to 5,000 clients, not by a marketing department.

Print it, tape it above the desk, quote from it.

Get the free Pricing Cheat Sheet — instant download, no spam, unsubscribe anytime.

Get it free

No spam, no daily "value emails" — unsubscribe anytime with one click.

The cheat sheet is the math. If you want the paperwork built too — pricing calculator, contracts, route tracker, invoices — Route Ready's paid starter kits exist for exactly that.

Templates are starting points, not legal advice. Have a local attorney review contracts before use.
